<!doctype html>
<html lang="pt-BR">
  <head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8" />
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
    <title>SÃ£o Rafael - Wizard V2</title>
    <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/marked/marked.min.js"></script>
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/highlight.js/11.9.0/styles/github-dark.min.css" />
    <script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/highlight.js/11.9.0/highlight.min.js"></script>
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@300;400;500;600;700;800&display=swap" rel="stylesheet" />
    <script src="https://unpkg.com/lucide@latest"></script>
    <script>
      (function () {
        // Iframe polyfills
        if (typeof window.localStorage === 'undefined') {
          const store = {};
          window.localStorage = { getItem: k => store[k] || null, setItem: (k, v) => { store[k] = v; }, removeItem: k => { delete store[k]; }, clear: () => { Object.keys(store).forEach(k => delete store[k]); } };
        }
      })();
    </script>
    <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@supabase/supabase-js@2"></script>
    <script>
      function buildAuthStorage() {
        const memStore = {};
        return {
          getItem: (key) => { try { return localStorage.getItem(key); } catch { return memStore[key] || null; } },
          setItem: (key, val) => { try { localStorage.setItem(key, val); } catch {} memStore[key] = val; },
          removeItem: (key) => { try { localStorage.removeItem(key); } catch {} delete memStore[key]; },
        };
      }
      function diagnoseAuthStorage(storage, key) { /* no-op in v2 */ }
      window.buildAuthStorage = buildAuthStorage;
    </script>
    <style>
      /* ============================================
         DESIGN SYSTEM â€” SÃ£o Rafael Wizard V2
         ============================================ */
      :root {
        --color-primary: #d82444;
        --color-primary-dark: #b31d38;
        --color-primary-light: #ff4d6a;
        --color-secondary: #1a1a2e;
        --color-accent: #16213e;
        --color-success: #10b981;
        --color-warning: #f59e0b;
        --color-error: #ef4444;
        --color-info: #2196f3;
        --bg-body: #f8fafc;
        --bg-card: #ffffff;
        --bg-input: #ffffff;
        --bg-tertiary: #f1f5f9;
        --text-primary: #1e293b;
        --text-secondary: #64748b;
        --text-muted: #94a3b8;
        --border-color: #e2e8f0;
        --border-focus: #d82444;
        --shadow-sm: 0 1px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.05);
        --shadow-md: 0 4px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.08);
        --shadow-lg: 0 8px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.12);
        --radius-sm: 6px;
        --radius-md: 10px;
        --radius-lg: 16px;
        --radius-xl: 20px;
        --transition: 0.2s ease;
      }

      [data-theme="dark"] {
        --bg-body: #0f172a;
        --bg-card: #1e293b;
        --bg-input: #1e293b;
        --bg-tertiary: #1a2332;
        --text-primary: #f1f5f9;
        --text-secondary: #94a3b8;
        --text-muted: #64748b;
        --border-color: #334155;
        --shadow-sm: 0 1px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.3);
        --shadow-md: 0 4px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.4);
        --shadow-lg: 0 8px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.5);
      }

      * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }
      body {
        font-family: 'Inter', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif;
        background: var(--bg-body);
        color: var(--text-primary);
        min-height: 100vh;
        overflow-x: hidden;
      }

      /* ===== LOGIN ===== */
      .login-overlay {
        position: fixed; inset: 0; background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--color-secondary) 0%, var(--color-accent) 100%);
        display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; z-index: 99999;
      }
      .login-box {
        background: var(--bg-card); border-radius: var(--radius-xl); padding: 40px; width: 90%; max-width: 400px; box-shadow: var(--shadow-lg);
      }
      .login-title { font-size: 24px; font-weight: 800; text-align: center; margin-bottom: 24px; color: var(--color-primary); }
      .login-input {
        width: 100%; padding: 12px 16px; border: 2px solid var(--border-color); border-radius: var(--radius-md);
        font-size: 14px; background: var(--bg-input); color: var(--text-primary); margin-bottom: 12px; transition: var(--transition);
      }
      .login-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: var(--border-focus); }
      .login-btn {
        width: 100%; padding: 14px; background: var(--color-primary); color: white; border: none;
        border-radius: var(--radius-md); font-size: 15px; font-weight: 700; cursor: pointer; transition: var(--transition);
      }
      .login-btn:hover { background: var(--color-primary-dark); }
      .err-msg { color: var(--color-error); font-size: 12px; text-align: center; margin-top: 8px; display: none; }

      /* ===== APP LAYOUT ===== */
      .app-container { display: flex; flex-direction: column; height: 100vh; }
      .app-header {
        display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;
        padding: 12px 24px; background: var(--bg-card); border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-color);
        box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm); z-index: 100;
      }
      .header-left { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; }
      .header-right { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; }
      .brand { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; }
      .brand span { font-size: 18px; font-weight: 800; color: var(--color-primary); }
      .header-tag {
        padding: 4px 10px; background: rgba(216,36,68,0.1); color: var(--color-primary);
        border-radius: 20px; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700;
      }
      .header-btn {
        padding: 8px 14px; border-radius: var(--radius-sm); border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
        background: transparent; color: var(--text-primary); font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600;
        cursor: pointer; transition: var(--transition); display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px;
      }
      .header-btn:hover { background: var(--bg-tertiary); }
      .header-btn.active { background: var(--color-primary); color: white; border-color: var(--color-primary); }

      .connection-badge {
        display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; padding: 6px 12px;
        border-radius: 20px; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600;
      }
      .connection-badge.online { background: rgba(16,185,129,0.1); color: var(--color-success); }
      .connection-badge.offline { background: rgba(239,68,68,0.1); color: var(--color-error); }
      .connection-dot { width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 50%; background: currentColor; animation: pulse 2s infinite; }
      @keyframes pulse { 0%,100% { opacity: 1; } 50% { opacity: 0.4; } }

      /* ===== MAIN CONTENT ===== */
      .main-content { display: flex; flex: 1; overflow: hidden; }
      .wizard-area { flex: 1; overflow-y: auto; padding: 24px; }

      /* ===== CHAT PANEL ===== */
      .chat-panel {
        width: 0; overflow: hidden; border-left: 1px solid var(--border-color);
        background: var(--bg-card); transition: width 0.3s ease; display: flex; flex-direction: column;
      }
      .chat-panel.open { width: 380px; }
      .chat-panel-header {
        display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;
        padding: 14px 16px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-color);
      }
      .chat-panel-header h3 { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; }
      #chatMessages { flex: 1; overflow-y: auto; padding: 16px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 12px; }
      .chat-input-area { padding: 12px; border-top: 1px solid var(--border-color); display: flex; gap: 8px; }
      .chat-input-area input {
        flex: 1; padding: 10px 14px; border: 2px solid var(--border-color); border-radius: var(--radius-md);
        font-size: 13px; background: var(--bg-input); color: var(--text-primary);
      }
      .chat-input-area input:focus { outline: none; border-color: var(--border-focus); }
      .chat-input-area button {
        padding: 10px 16px; background: var(--color-primary); color: white; border: none;
        border-radius: var(--radius-md); font-weight: 700; cursor: pointer;
      }
      .chat-msg { padding: 10px 14px; border-radius: var(--radius-md); max-width: 90%; font-size: 13px; line-height: 1.5; }
      .chat-msg.user { align-self: flex-end; background: var(--color-primary); color: white; }
      .chat-msg.assistant { align-self: flex-start; background: var(--bg-tertiary); }
      .chat-msg.system { align-self: center; background: rgba(33,150,243,0.1); color: var(--color-info); font-size: 12px; text-align: center; }

      /* ===== WIZARD CONTAINER ===== */
      .wizard-container { max-width: 900px; margin: 0 auto; }

      /* ===== STEP INDICATOR ===== */
      .step-indicator { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 4px; margin-bottom: 24px; flex-wrap: wrap; }
      .step-dot {
        width: 32px; height: 32px; border-radius: 50%; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
        font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; border: 2px solid var(--border-color); color: var(--text-muted);
        cursor: pointer; transition: var(--transition);
      }
      .step-dot.active { background: var(--color-primary); color: white; border-color: var(--color-primary); transform: scale(1.1); }
      .step-dot.completed { background: var(--color-success); color: white; border-color: var(--color-success); }
      .step-line { width: 20px; height: 2px; background: var(--border-color); }
      .step-line.completed { background: var(--color-success); }

      /* ===== STEP CARD ===== */
      .step-card { background: var(--bg-card); border-radius: var(--radius-lg); padding: 32px; box-shadow: var(--shadow-md); }
      .step-header { margin-bottom: 24px; }
      .step-header h2 { font-size: 20px; font-weight: 800; color: var(--text-primary); margin-bottom: 4px; }
      .step-header p { font-size: 13px; color: var(--text-secondary); }

      /* ===== FORM FIELDS ===== */
      .form-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(260px, 1fr)); gap: 16px; }
      .form-grid .full-width { grid-column: 1 / -1; }
      .form-group { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; }
      .form-group label { font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--text-primary); display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; }
      .form-group label .required { color: var(--color-error); }
      .form-group label .field-tag {
        font-size: 9px; padding: 2px 6px; background: rgba(216,36,68,0.1); color: var(--color-primary);
        border-radius: 4px; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase;
      }
      .form-input, .form-select, .form-textarea {
        padding: 10px 14px; border: 2px solid var(--border-color); border-radius: var(--radius-md);
        font-size: 13px; background: var(--bg-input); color: var(--text-primary); transition: var(--transition);
        width: 100%;
      }
      .form-input:focus, .form-select:focus, .form-textarea:focus { outline: none; border-color: var(--border-focus); }
      .form-input.error, .form-select.error, .form-textarea.error { border-color: var(--color-error); }
      .form-textarea { min-height: 80px; resize: vertical; }
      .field-error { font-size: 11px; color: var(--color-error); display: none; }
      .field-error.show { display: block; }
      .field-hint { font-size: 11px; color: var(--text-muted); }

      /* ===== PRODUCT CARDS ===== */
      .product-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(200px, 1fr)); gap: 16px; }
      .product-card {
        background: var(--bg-card); border: 2px solid var(--border-color); border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
        padding: 24px; text-align: center; cursor: pointer; transition: var(--transition);
        display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 12px;
      }
      .product-card:hover { border-color: var(--color-primary); transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: var(--shadow-md); }
      .product-card.selected { border-color: var(--color-primary); background: rgba(216,36,68,0.05); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(216,36,68,0.15); }
      .product-card-icon { font-size: 36px; }
      .product-card-title { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--text-primary); }
      .product-card-desc { font-size: 11px; color: var(--text-secondary); }

      /* ===== CLIENT FINDER ===== */
      .client-search-box {
        position: relative; display: flex; gap: 8px; margin-bottom: 16px;
      }
      .client-search-box input { flex: 1; }
      .client-results { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; margin-bottom: 16px; }
      .client-result-card {
        display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 14px 16px;
        border: 2px solid var(--border-color); border-radius: var(--radius-md); cursor: pointer; transition: var(--transition);
      }
      .client-result-card:hover { border-color: var(--color-primary); background: rgba(216,36,68,0.02); }
      .client-result-card.selected { border-color: var(--color-success); background: rgba(16,185,129,0.05); }
      .client-result-info h4 { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--text-primary); }
      .client-result-info p { font-size: 11px; color: var(--text-secondary); margin-top: 2px; }
      .client-result-badge { font-size: 10px; padding: 4px 8px; background: rgba(33,150,243,0.1); color: var(--color-info); border-radius: 12px; font-weight: 600; }

      .client-form-section {
        border: 2px solid var(--border-color); border-radius: var(--radius-lg); padding: 20px; margin-top: 16px;
      }
      .client-form-section h4 { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 16px; color: var(--text-primary); }

      /* ===== SVG DIMENSION VIEWER ===== */
      .dimension-viewer { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 24px; margin-bottom: 20px; }
      .dimension-svg-container {
        background: var(--bg-tertiary); border-radius: var(--radius-md); padding: 16px;
        display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; min-height: 280px;
      }
      .dimension-svg-container svg { width: 100%; height: auto; max-height: 300px; }
      .dimension-inputs { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 12px; }
      .dimension-calc {
        background: rgba(16,185,129,0.05); border: 1px solid rgba(16,185,129,0.2); border-radius: var(--radius-md);
        padding: 12px; margin-top: 12px;
      }
      .dimension-calc h5 { font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--color-success); margin-bottom: 8px; text-transform: uppercase; }
      .dimension-calc .calc-row { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; font-size: 12px; padding: 4px 0; }
      .dimension-calc .calc-row .label { color: var(--text-secondary); }
      .dimension-calc .calc-row .value { font-weight: 700; color: var(--text-primary); }

      /* ===== DOOR PLACEMENT ===== */
      .door-placement-container { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 16px; }
      .door-svg-container {
        background: var(--bg-tertiary); border-radius: var(--radius-md); padding: 16px;
        min-height: 300px; position: relative;
      }
      .door-svg-container svg { width: 100%; height: auto; }
      .door-wall { cursor: pointer; transition: fill 0.2s; }
      .door-wall:hover { fill: rgba(216,36,68,0.15) !important; }
      .door-list { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; }
      .door-item {
        display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 12px 14px;
        background: var(--bg-tertiary); border-radius: var(--radius-md); border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
      }
      .door-item-info { font-size: 12px; color: var(--text-primary); }
      .door-item-actions { display: flex; gap: 6px; }
      .door-item-actions button {
        padding: 4px 8px; font-size: 10px; border: none; border-radius: 4px; cursor: pointer; font-weight: 600;
      }

      /* ===== OPTIONALS GRID ===== */
      .optionals-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(150px, 1fr)); gap: 12px; }
      .optional-card {
        border: 2px solid var(--border-color); border-radius: var(--radius-md); padding: 16px;
        text-align: center; cursor: pointer; transition: var(--transition);
      }
      .optional-card:hover { border-color: var(--color-primary); }
      .optional-card.active { border-color: var(--color-success); background: rgba(16,185,129,0.05); }
      .optional-card-icon { font-size: 24px; margin-bottom: 8px; }
      .optional-card-title { font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--text-primary); }

      /* ===== REVIEW SECTION ===== */
      .review-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(280px, 1fr)); gap: 16px; }
      .review-section {
        background: var(--bg-tertiary); border-radius: var(--radius-md); padding: 16px; border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
      }
      .review-section h4 { font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--text-primary); margin-bottom: 10px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; }
      .review-row { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; padding: 4px 0; font-size: 11px; }
      .review-row .rl { color: var(--text-secondary); }
      .review-row .rv { font-weight: 600; color: var(--text-primary); }

      /* ===== WIZARD NAV ===== */
      .wizard-nav { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; margin-top: 24px; gap: 12px; }
      .btn-wizard {
        padding: 12px 24px; border-radius: var(--radius-md); font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700;
        cursor: pointer; transition: var(--transition); border: none;
      }
      .btn-prev { background: var(--bg-tertiary); color: var(--text-primary); border: 1px solid var(--border-color); }
      .btn-prev:hover { background: var(--border-color); }
      .btn-next { background: var(--color-primary); color: white; }
      .btn-next:hover { background: var(--color-primary-dark); }
      .btn-next:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }
      .btn-submit-style { background: var(--color-success); }
      .btn-submit-style:hover { background: #059669; }

      /* ===== HISTORY MODAL ===== */
      .modal-overlay {
        position: fixed; inset: 0; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.5); display: flex;
        align-items: center; justify-content: center; z-index: 10000;
      }
      .modal-content {
        background: var(--bg-card); border-radius: var(--radius-xl); padding: 24px;
        width: 90%; max-width: 700px; max-height: 85vh; overflow-y: auto; box-shadow: var(--shadow-lg);
      }
      .modal-header { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 16px; }
      .modal-header h3 { font-size: 16px; font-weight: 800; }
      .modal-close { background: none; border: none; font-size: 20px; cursor: pointer; color: var(--text-secondary); }

      /* ===== SIDEBAR ===== */
      .sidebar-overlay { position: fixed; inset: 0; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.4); z-index: 9998; opacity: 0; pointer-events: none; transition: opacity 0.3s; }
      .sidebar-overlay.open { opacity: 1; pointer-events: auto; }
      .sidebar {
        position: fixed; top: 0; left: -300px; width: 280px; height: 100vh; background: var(--bg-card);
        z-index: 9999; transition: left 0.3s; box-shadow: var(--shadow-lg); display: flex; flex-direction: column;
      }
      .sidebar.open { left: 0; }
      .sidebar-header { padding: 20px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-color); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; }
      .sidebar-user { padding: 16px 20px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-color); display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; }
      .sidebar-user-avatar {
        width: 36px; height: 36px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--color-primary); color: white;
        display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-weight: 700; font-size: 14px;
      }
      .sidebar-user-name { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--text-primary); }
      .sidebar-user-role { font-size: 11px; color: var(--text-secondary); }
      .sidebar-nav { flex: 1; padding: 12px 0; overflow-y: auto; }
      .sidebar-nav-item {
        display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; padding: 12px 20px;
        font-size: 13px; color: var(--text-primary); cursor: pointer; transition: var(--transition);
      }
      .sidebar-nav-item:hover { background: var(--bg-tertiary); }
      .sidebar-nav-item.danger { color: var(--color-error); }
      .sidebar-nav-divider { height: 1px; background: var(--border-color); margin: 8px 16px; }

      /* ===== DYNAMIC ARRAY ===== */
      .array-section { margin-top: 16px; }
      .array-header { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 12px; }
      .array-header h4 { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; }
      .btn-add-item {
        padding: 8px 14px; background: var(--color-info); color: white; border: none;
        border-radius: var(--radius-sm); font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer;
      }
      .btn-add-item:hover { opacity: 0.9; }
      .array-item { border: 1px solid var(--border-color); border-radius: var(--radius-md); padding: 16px; margin-bottom: 12px; }
      .array-item-header { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 12px; }
      .array-item-header span { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--color-primary); }
      .btn-remove-item { padding: 4px 10px; background: var(--color-error); color: white; border: none; border-radius: 4px; font-size: 11px; cursor: pointer; }

      /* ===== RESPONSIVE ===== */
      @media (max-width: 900px) {
        .chat-panel.open { width: 100%; position: absolute; right: 0; top: 0; bottom: 0; z-index: 200; }
        .dimension-viewer { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
        .product-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(150px, 1fr)); }
      }
      @media (max-width: 480px) {
        .wizard-area { padding: 12px; }
        .step-card { padding: 20px; }
        .form-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
      }

      /* ===== SCROLLBAR ===== */
      ::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 6px; }
      ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: var(--border-color); border-radius: 3px; }

      /* ===== CREATABLE SELECT ===== */
      .creatable-container { position: relative; }
      .creatable-input {
        width: 100%; padding: 10px 14px; border: 2px solid var(--border-color); border-radius: var(--radius-md);
        font-size: 13px; background: var(--bg-input); color: var(--text-primary); transition: var(--transition);
      }
      .creatable-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: var(--border-focus); }
      .creatable-dropdown {
        position: absolute; top: 100%; left: 0; right: 0; background: var(--bg-card);
        border: 1px solid var(--border-color); border-radius: var(--radius-md); margin-top: 4px;
        max-height: 180px; overflow-y: auto; z-index: 50; display: none; box-shadow: var(--shadow-md);
      }
      .creatable-dropdown.open { display: block; }
      .creatable-option { padding: 8px 14px; font-size: 12px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s; }
      .creatable-option:hover { background: var(--bg-tertiary); }
      .creatable-option.selected { background: rgba(216,36,68,0.08); font-weight: 600; }

// ============================================
// WIZARD ENGINE
// ============================================
class WizardEngine {
  constructor() {
    this.currentStep = 0;
    this.steps = ['cliente', 'produto']; // Initial steps before product selection
    this.formData = this.loadFromStorage() || {};
    this.selectedProduct = this.formData._selectedProduct || null;
    this.selectedClient = this.formData._selectedClient || null;

    if (this.selectedProduct && PRODUCT_TYPES[this.selectedProduct]) {
      this.steps = PRODUCT_TYPES[this.selectedProduct].steps;
    }

    this.currentStep = parseInt(localStorage.getItem('wizard_v2_step') || '0');
    if (this.currentStep >= this.steps.length) this.currentStep = 0;
  }

  get totalSteps() { return this.steps.length; }
  get currentStepId() { return this.steps[this.currentStep]; }
  get currentModule() { return STEP_MODULES[this.currentStepId]; }

  setProduct(productId) {
    this.selectedProduct = productId;
    this.formData._selectedProduct = productId;
    this.steps = PRODUCT_TYPES[productId].steps;
    this.saveToStorage();
  }

  setClient(client) {
    this.selectedClient = client;
    this.formData._selectedClient = client;
    this.saveToStorage();
  }

  getStepData(stepId) {
    if (!this.formData[stepId]) this.formData[stepId] = {};
    return this.formData[stepId];
  }

  setStepData(stepId, data) {
    this.formData[stepId] = { ...this.formData[stepId], ...data };
    this.saveToStorage();
  }

  next() {
    if (this.currentStep < this.totalSteps - 1) {
      this.currentStep++;
      localStorage.setItem('wizard_v2_step', this.currentStep);
      this.render();
    }
  }

  prev() {
    if (this.currentStep > 0) {
      this.currentStep--;
      localStorage.setItem('wizard_v2_step', this.currentStep);
      this.render();
    }
  }

  goTo(idx) {
    if (idx >= 0 && idx < this.totalSteps) {
      this.currentStep = idx;
      localStorage.setItem('wizard_v2_step', this.currentStep);
      this.render();
    }
  }

  saveToStorage() {
    localStorage.setItem('wizard_v2_formData', JSON.stringify(this.formData));
  }

  loadFromStorage() {
    try {
      const raw = localStorage.getItem('wizard_v2_formData');
      return raw ? JSON.parse(raw) : null;
    } catch { return null; }
  }

  clearStorage() {
    localStorage.removeItem('wizard_v2_formData');
    localStorage.removeItem('wizard_v2_step');
    this.formData = {};
    this.selectedProduct = null;
    this.selectedClient = null;
    this.currentStep = 0;
    this.steps = ['cliente', 'produto'];
    this.render();
  }

  // Validates the current step's required fields
  validateCurrentStep() {
    const stepId = this.currentStepId;
    const module = STEP_MODULES[stepId];
    if (!module || !module.fields) return { valid: true, errors: [] };

    const data = this.getStepData(stepId);
    const errors = [];

    // For dynamic array steps
    if (module.isDynamic && module.arrayField) {
      const items = data[module.arrayField] || [];
      if (items.length < (module.arrayMin || 1)) {
        errors.push(`Adicione pelo menos ${module.arrayMin || 1} ${module.arrayLabel || 'item'}.`);
      }
      items.forEach((item, idx) => {
        Object.entries(module.arrayFields).forEach(([key, field]) => {
          if (field.required && (!item[key] || String(item[key]).trim() === '')) {
            errors.push(`${module.arrayLabel} #${idx+1}: "${field.label}" Ã© obrigatÃ³rio.`);
          }
        });
      });
      return { valid: errors.length === 0, errors };
    }

    // Standard fields
    Object.entries(module.fields).forEach(([key, field]) => {
      if (field.required) {
        const val = data[key];
        if (val === undefined || val === null || String(val).trim() === '') {
          errors.push(`"${field.label}" Ã© obrigatÃ³rio.`);
        }
      }
    });
    return { valid: errors.length === 0, errors };
  }

  render() {
    const container = document.getElementById('wizardContainer');
    if (!container) return;

    // Render step indicator
    let indicatorHTML = '<div class="step-indicator">';
    this.steps.forEach((stepId, idx) => {
      const module = STEP_MODULES[stepId];
      const isActive = idx === this.currentStep;
      const isCompleted = idx < this.currentStep;
      let dotClass = 'step-dot';
      if (isActive) dotClass += ' active';
      if (isCompleted) dotClass += ' completed';
      indicatorHTML += `<div class="${dotClass}" onclick="wizard.goTo(${idx})" title="${module?.title || stepId}">${idx + 1}</div>`;
      if (idx < this.steps.length - 1) indicatorHTML += `<div class="step-line${isCompleted ? ' completed' : ''}"></div>`;
    });
    indicatorHTML += '</div>';

    // Render current step
    const stepId = this.currentStepId;
    const module = STEP_MODULES[stepId];
    let stepHTML = '';

    switch (module?.component) {
      case 'StepCliente': stepHTML = this.renderClientStep(); break;
      case 'StepProduto': stepHTML = this.renderProductStep(); break;
      case 'StepDimensoesVisual': stepHTML = this.renderDimensionsStep(); break;
      case 'StepPortasVisual': stepHTML = this.renderDoorsStep(); break;
      case 'StepOpcionais': stepHTML = this.renderOptionalsStep(); break;
      case 'StepRevisao': stepHTML = this.renderReviewStep(); break;
      default: stepHTML = this.renderFormStep(stepId, module); break;
    }

    // Navigation
    const isFirst = this.currentStep === 0;
    const isLast = this.currentStep === this.totalSteps - 1;
    let navHTML = '<div class="wizard-nav">';
    navHTML += isFirst ? '<div></div>' : '<button class="btn-wizard btn-prev" onclick="wizard.prev()">â† Anterior</button>';
    if (isLast) {
      navHTML += '<button class="btn-wizard btn-next btn-submit-style" onclick="wizard.submit()">âœ… Enviar OrÃ§amento</button>';
    } else {
      navHTML += '<button class="btn-wizard btn-next" onclick="wizard.advance()">PrÃ³ximo â†’</button>';
    }
    navHTML += '</div>';

    container.innerHTML = indicatorHTML + '<div class="step-card">' + stepHTML + '</div>' + navHTML;

    // Post-render bindings
    this.bindCurrentStep();
    if (typeof lucide !== 'undefined') lucide.createIcons();
  }

  advance() {
    const stepId = this.currentStepId;

    // Special validation for client step
    if (stepId === 'cliente' && !this.selectedClient) {
      alert('Selecione ou cadastre um cliente antes de continuar.');
      return;
    }
    // Special for product step
    if (stepId === 'produto' && !this.selectedProduct) {
      alert('Selecione um tipo de produto.');
      return;
    }

    // Validate form fields
    const { valid, errors } = this.validateCurrentStep();
    if (!valid) {
      alert('Preencha os campos obrigatÃ³rios:\n\nâ€¢ ' + errors.join('\nâ€¢ '));
      return;
    }

    this.next();
  }

  async searchClient() {
    const query = document.getElementById('clientSearchInput')?.value?.trim();
    if (!query || query.length < 2) return;

    const resultsEl = document.getElementById('clientResults');
    resultsEl.innerHTML = '<p style="color:var(--text-secondary);font-size:12px;">Buscando...</p>';

    try {
      const { data, error } = await sbClient.rpc('saorafael_search_clients', { p_query: query });
      if (error) throw error;

      if (!data || data.length === 0) {
        resultsEl.innerHTML = '<p style="color:var(--text-muted);font-size:12px;">Nenhum cliente encontrado. Cadastre um novo abaixo.</p>';
        return;
      }

      resultsEl.innerHTML = data.map(c => `
        <div class="client-result-card" onclick="wizard.selectClient(${JSON.stringify(c).replace(/"/g, '"')})">
          <div class="client-result-info">
            <h4>ðŸ¢ ${escapeHtml(c.razao_social)}</h4>
            <p>${escapeHtml(c.cnpj_cpf || 'Sem CNPJ')} Â· ${escapeHtml(c.cidade || '')}/${escapeHtml(c.estado || '')}</p>
          </div>
          <span class="client-result-badge">${c.total_orcamentos || 0} orÃ§amento(s)</span>
        </div>
      `).join('');
    } catch (err) {
      resultsEl.innerHTML = `<p style="color:var(--color-error);font-size:12px;">Erro: ${escapeHtml(err.message)}</p>`;
    }
  }

  selectClient(client) {
    this.selectedClient = client;
    this.formData._selectedClient = client;
    this.formData.cliente = {
      client_id: client.id,
      razao_social: client.razao_social,
      cnpj_cpf: client.cnpj_cpf,
      telefone: client.telefone,
      email: client.email,
      cidade: client.cidade,
      estado: client.estado,
    };
    this.saveToStorage();
    this.render();
  }

  clearClient() {
    this.selectedClient = null;
    this.formData._selectedClient = null;
    delete this.formData.cliente;
    this.saveToStorage();
    this.render();
  }

  async saveNewClient() {
    const razao = document.getElementById('nc_razao_social')?.value?.trim();
    const cnpj = document.getElementById('nc_cnpj_cpf')?.value?.trim();
    const telefone = document.getElementById('nc_telefone')?.value?.trim();
    const email = document.getElementById('nc_email')?.value?.trim();
    const cidade = document.getElementById('nc_cidade')?.value?.trim();
    const estado = document.getElementById('nc_estado')?.value;
    const cep = document.getElementById('nc_cep')?.value?.trim();
    const endereco = document.getElementById('nc_endereco')?.value?.trim();
    const local = document.getElementById('nc_local_instalacao')?.value?.trim();

    if (!razao) { alert('RazÃ£o Social Ã© obrigatÃ³ria.'); return; }
    if (!telefone) { alert('Telefone Ã© obrigatÃ³rio.'); return; }
    if (!cidade || !estado) { alert('Cidade e Estado sÃ£o obrigatÃ³rios.'); return; }

    try {
      const { data: clientId, error } = await sbClient.rpc('saorafael_upsert_client', {
        p_razao_social: razao,
        p_cnpj_cpf: cnpj || null,
        p_telefone: telefone,
        p_email: email || null,
        p_cidade: cidade,
        p_estado: estado,
        p_cep: cep || null,
        p_endereco: endereco || null,
        p_local_instalacao: local || null,
      });
      if (error) throw error;

      const newClient = { id: clientId, razao_social: razao, cnpj_cpf: cnpj, telefone, email, cidade, estado };
      this.selectClient(newClient);
      addChatMessage(`âœ… Cliente "${razao}" cadastrado com sucesso!`, 'system');
    } catch (err) {
      alert('Erro ao salvar cliente: ' + err.message);
    }
  }

  // ===== DIMENSIONS STEP (SVG) =====
  renderDimensionsStep() {
    const data = this.getStepData('dimensoes_visual');
    const module = STEP_MODULES.dimensoes_visual;

    const comp = parseFloat(data.comprimento_ext) || 4.48;
    const larg = parseFloat(data.largura_ext) || 3.36;
    const alt = parseFloat(data.altura_ext) || 3.00;
    const esp = parseFloat(data.espessura_painel) || 100;
    const espM = esp / 1000;
    const compInt = (comp - 2 * espM).toFixed(2);
    const largInt = (larg - 2 * espM).toFixed(2);
    const altInt = (alt - 2 * espM).toFixed(2);
    const volume = (compInt * largInt * altInt).toFixed(1);
    const area = (compInt * largInt).toFixed(1);

    let html = `<div class="step-header"><h2>ðŸ“ ${module.title}</h2><p>${module.description}</p></div>`;

    html += '<div class="dimension-viewer">';

    // SVG - Top-down view
    const svgW = 280, svgH = 220;
    const scale = Math.min((svgW - 40) / comp, (svgH - 40) / larg);
    const rW = comp * scale, rH = larg * scale;
    const offsetX = (svgW - rW) / 2, offsetY = (svgH - rH) / 2;
    const wallPx = espM * scale;

    html += `<div class="dimension-svg-container">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 ${svgW} ${svgH}" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
        <!-- Parede externa -->
        <rect x="${offsetX}" y="${offsetY}" width="${rW}" height="${rH}" fill="#cfd8dc" stroke="#455a64" stroke-width="1.5" rx="2"/>
        <!-- Interior -->
        <rect x="${offsetX + wallPx}" y="${offsetY + wallPx}" width="${rW - 2*wallPx}" height="${rH - 2*wallPx}" fill="#e3f2fd" stroke="#90caf9" stroke-width="1" rx="1"/>
        <!-- Labels -->
        <text x="${svgW/2}" y="${offsetY - 6}" text-anchor="middle" font-size="10" fill="#455a64" font-weight="600">â—„â”€ ${comp}m â”€â–º</text>
        <text x="${offsetX - 6}" y="${svgH/2}" text-anchor="middle" font-size="10" fill="#455a64" font-weight="600" transform="rotate(-90, ${offsetX - 6}, ${svgH/2})">${larg}m</text>
        <text x="${svgW/2}" y="${svgH/2}" text-anchor="middle" font-size="9" fill="#1976d2">Interior: ${compInt}Ã—${largInt}m</text>
        <text x="${svgW/2}" y="${svgH/2 + 14}" text-anchor="middle" font-size="8" fill="#64748b">Painel: ${esp}mm</text>
      </svg>
    </div>`;

    // Inputs
    html += '<div class="dimension-inputs">';
    html += this.renderFieldInput('comprimento_ext', module.fields.comprimento_ext, data.comprimento_ext || '');
    html += this.renderFieldInput('largura_ext', module.fields.largura_ext, data.largura_ext || '');
    html += this.renderFieldInput('altura_ext', module.fields.altura_ext, data.altura_ext || '');
    html += this.renderFieldInput('espessura_painel', module.fields.espessura_painel, data.espessura_painel || '100');
    html += this.renderFieldInput('tipo_isolamento', module.fields.tipo_isolamento, data.tipo_isolamento || '');
    html += this.renderFieldInput('revestimento_interno', module.fields.revestimento_interno, data.revestimento_interno || '');
    html += this.renderFieldInput('revestimento_externo', module.fields.revestimento_externo, data.revestimento_externo || '');
    html += this.renderFieldInput('piso', module.fields.piso, data.piso || '');

    // Calculated values
    html += `<div class="dimension-calc">
      <h5>Valores Calculados</h5>
      <div class="calc-row"><span class="label">Comprimento Int:</span><span class="value">${compInt} m</span></div>
      <div class="calc-row"><span class="label">Largura Int:</span><span class="value">${largInt} m</span></div>
      <div class="calc-row"><span class="label">Altura Int:</span><span class="value">${altInt} m</span></div>
      <div class="calc-row"><span class="label">Ãrea Piso:</span><span class="value">${area} mÂ²</span></div>
      <div class="calc-row"><span class="label">Volume:</span><span class="value">${volume} mÂ³</span></div>
    </div>`;
    html += '</div>'; // dimension-inputs
    html += '</div>'; // dimension-viewer

    return html;
  }

  // ===== DOORS STEP (SVG) =====
  renderDoorsStep() {
    const dimData = this.getStepData('dimensoes_visual');
    const doorsData = this.getStepData('portas_visual');
    const doors = doorsData.portas || [];

    const comp = parseFloat(dimData.comprimento_ext) || 4.48;
    const larg = parseFloat(dimData.largura_ext) || 3.36;

    let html = `<div class="step-header"><h2>ðŸšª Portas</h2><p>Clique em uma parede para adicionar uma porta.</p></div>`;

    // SVG with clickable walls
    const svgW = 400, svgH = 300;
    const margin = 50;
    const scale = Math.min((svgW - 2*margin) / comp, (svgH - 2*margin) / larg);
    const rW = comp * scale, rH = larg * scale;
    const oX = (svgW - rW) / 2, oY = (svgH - rH) / 2;

    html += `<div class="door-placement-container">
      <div class="door-svg-container">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 ${svgW} ${svgH}" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" id="doorSvg">
          <rect x="${oX}" y="${oY}" width="${rW}" height="${rH}" fill="#e3f2fd" stroke="#455a64" stroke-width="2" rx="2"/>
          <!-- Clickable walls -->
          <rect class="door-wall" x="${oX}" y="${oY - 12}" width="${rW}" height="14" fill="rgba(0,0,0,0.03)" data-wall="norte" onclick="wizard.addDoorToWall('norte')"/>
          <rect class="door-wall" x="${oX}" y="${oY + rH - 2}" width="${rW}" height="14" fill="rgba(0,0,0,0.03)" data-wall="sul" onclick="wizard.addDoorToWall('sul')"/>
          <rect class="door-wall" x="${oX - 12}" y="${oY}" width="14" height="${rH}" fill="rgba(0,0,0,0.03)" data-wall="oeste" onclick="wizard.addDoorToWall('oeste')"/>
          <rect class="door-wall" x="${oX + rW - 2}" y="${oY}" width="14" height="${rH}" fill="rgba(0,0,0,0.03)" data-wall="leste" onclick="wizard.addDoorToWall('leste')"/>
          <!-- Wall labels -->
          <text x="${svgW/2}" y="${oY - 16}" text-anchor="middle" font-size="10" fill="#455a64" font-weight="600">NORTE (${comp}m)</text>
          <text x="${svgW/2}" y="${oY + rH + 22}" text-anchor="middle" font-size="10" fill="#455a64" font-weight="600">SUL</text>
          <text x="${oX - 18}" y="${svgH/2}" text-anchor="middle" font-size="10" fill="#455a64" font-weight="600" transform="rotate(-90,${oX-18},${svgH/2})">OESTE (${larg}m)</text>
          <text x="${oX + rW + 18}" y="${svgH/2}" text-anchor="middle" font-size="10" fill="#455a64" font-weight="600" transform="rotate(90,${oX+rW+18},${svgH/2})">LESTE</text>
          <!-- Door markers -->
          ${doors.map((d, i) => {
            let dx, dy;
            if (d.parede === 'norte') { dx = oX + rW/2; dy = oY + 2; }
            else if (d.parede === 'sul') { dx = oX + rW/2; dy = oY + rH - 6; }
            else if (d.parede === 'oeste') { dx = oX + 2; dy = oY + rH/2; }
            else { dx = oX + rW - 6; dy = oY + rH/2; }
            return `<g><rect x="${dx-10}" y="${dy-4}" width="20" height="8" fill="#d82444" rx="2" opacity="0.8"/><text x="${dx}" y="${dy+3}" text-anchor="middle" font-size="7" fill="white" font-weight="700">P${i+1}</text></g>`;
          }).join('')}
        </svg>
      </div>`;

    // Door list
    html += '<div class="door-list">';
    if (doors.length === 0) {
      html += '<p style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text-muted);text-align:center;padding:16px;">Nenhuma porta adicionada. Clique em uma parede acima.</p>';
    } else {
      doors.forEach((d, i) => {
        html += `<div class="door-item">
          <div class="door-item-info">ðŸšª <strong>Porta ${i+1}:</strong> ${d.tipo} ${d.largura}x${d.altura}mm â€” Parede ${d.parede}</div>
          <div class="door-item-actions">
            <button onclick="wizard.removeDoor(${i})" style="background:var(--color-error);color:white;">Remover</button>
          </div>
        </div>`;
      });
    }
    html += '<button class="btn-add-item" onclick="wizard.showDoorModal()" style="margin-top:8px;">+ Adicionar Porta Manualmente</button>';
    html += '</div></div>';

    return html;
  }

  confirmAddDoor() {
    const parede = document.getElementById('door_parede').value;

  removeDoor(idx) {
    const data = this.getStepData('portas_visual');
    if (data.portas) data.portas.splice(idx, 1);
    this.setStepData('portas_visual', data);
    this.render();
  }

  // ===== OPTIONALS STEP =====
  renderOptionalsStep() {
    const data = this.getStepData('opcionais');
    const selected = data.selectedItems || {};

    let html = `<div class="step-header"><h2>âš™ï¸ Opcionais e Extras</h2><p>Selecione os opcionais desejados para este equipamento.</p></div>`;
    html += '<div class="optionals-grid">';
    OPTIONAL_ITEMS.forEach(item => {
      const isActive = selected[item.id] ? ' active' : '';
      html += `<div class="optional-card${isActive}" onclick="wizard.toggleOptional('${item.id}')">
        <div class="optional-card-icon">${item.icon}</div>
        <div class="optional-card-title">${item.title}</div>
      </div>`;
    });
    html += '</div>';

    // Details for selected
    const selectedIds = Object.keys(selected).filter(k => selected[k]);
    if (selectedIds.length > 0) {
      html += '<div style="margin-top:20px;border-top:1px solid var(--border-color);padding-top:16px;">';
      html += '<h4 style="font-size:13px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:12px;">Detalhes dos Opcionais Selecionados</h4>';
      html += '<div class="form-grid">';
      selectedIds.forEach(id => {
        const item = OPTIONAL_ITEMS.find(o => o.id === id);
        if (item && item.options.length > 0) {
          html += `<div class="form-group"><label>${item.icon} ${item.title}</label>
            <select class="form-select" onchange="wizard.setOptionalDetail('${id}', this.value)">
              <option value="">Selecione...</option>
              ${item.options.map(o => `<option value="${o}" ${selected[id] === o ? 'selected' : ''}>${o}</option>`).join('')}
            </select>
          </div>`;
        }
      });
      html += '</div></div>';
    }

    return html;
  }

  toggleOptional(id) {
    const data = this.getStepData('opcionais');
    if (!data.selectedItems) data.selectedItems = {};
    data.selectedItems[id] = data.selectedItems[id] ? false : true;
    this.setStepData('opcionais', data);
    this.render();
  }

  setOptionalDetail(id, value) {
    const data = this.getStepData('opcionais');
    if (!data.selectedItems) data.selectedItems = {};
    data.selectedItems[id] = value || true;
    this.setStepData('opcionais', data);
  }

  // ===== REVIEW STEP =====
  renderReviewStep() {
    let html = `<div class="step-header"><h2>ðŸ“‹ RevisÃ£o do OrÃ§amento</h2><p>Confira todos os dados antes de enviar.</p></div>`;
    html += '<div class="review-grid">';

    // Client
    if (this.selectedClient) {
      html += `<div class="review-section"><h4>ðŸ‘¤ Cliente</h4>`;
      html += this.reviewRow('RazÃ£o Social', this.selectedClient.razao_social);
      html += this.reviewRow('CNPJ/CPF', this.selectedClient.cnpj_cpf);
      html += this.reviewRow('Cidade/UF', `${this.selectedClient.cidade || ''}/${this.selectedClient.estado || ''}`);
      html += '</div>';
    }

    // Product
    if (this.selectedProduct) {
      const prod = PRODUCT_TYPES[this.selectedProduct];
      html += `<div class="review-section"><h4>ðŸ“¦ Produto</h4>`;
      html += this.reviewRow('Tipo', prod.name);
      html += '</div>';
    }

    // All step data
    this.steps.forEach(stepId => {
      const module = STEP_MODULES[stepId];
      if (!module || !module.fields || stepId === 'revisao') return;
      const data = this.getStepData(stepId);
      if (Object.keys(data).length === 0) return;

      html += `<div class="review-section"><h4>${module.title}</h4>`;
      if (module.isDynamic && module.arrayField) {
        const items = data[module.arrayField] || [];
        items.forEach((item, idx) => {
          html += `<p style="font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:var(--color-primary);margin:8px 0 4px;">${module.arrayLabel} #${idx+1}</p>`;
          Object.entries(module.arrayFields).forEach(([key, field]) => {
            if (item[key]) html += this.reviewRow(field.label, item[key]);
          });
        });
      } else {
        Object.entries(module.fields).forEach(([key, field]) => {
          if (data[key]) html += this.reviewRow(field.label, data[key]);
        });
      }
      html += '</div>';
    });

    // Dimensions calculated
    const dimData = this.getStepData('dimensoes_visual');
    if (dimData.comprimento_ext) {
      const esp = (parseFloat(dimData.espessura_painel) || 100) / 1000;
      const compI = (parseFloat(dimData.comprimento_ext) - 2 * esp).toFixed(2);
      const largI = (parseFloat(dimData.largura_ext) - 2 * esp).toFixed(2);
      const altI = (parseFloat(dimData.altura_ext) - 2 * esp).toFixed(2);
      html += `<div class="review-section"><h4>ðŸ“ DimensÃµes Internas (calculadas)</h4>`;
      html += this.reviewRow('DimensÃµes Int.', `${compI} Ã— ${largI} Ã— ${altI} m`);
      html += this.reviewRow('Volume', `${(compI * largI * altI).toFixed(1)} mÂ³`);
      html += this.reviewRow('Ãrea Piso', `${(compI * largI).toFixed(1)} mÂ²`);
      html += '</div>';
    }

    // Doors
    const doorsData = this.getStepData('portas_visual');
    if (doorsData.portas && doorsData.portas.length > 0) {
      html += `<div class="review-section"><h4>ðŸšª Portas</h4>`;
      doorsData.portas.forEach((d, i) => {
        html += this.reviewRow(`Porta ${i+1}`, `${d.tipo} ${d.largura}Ã—${d.altura}mm â€” ${d.parede}`);
      });
      html += '</div>';
    }

    // Optionals
    const optData = this.getStepData('opcionais');
    if (optData.selectedItems) {
      const active = Object.entries(optData.selectedItems).filter(([,v]) => v);
      if (active.length > 0) {
        html += `<div class="review-section"><h4>âš™ï¸ Opcionais</h4>`;
        active.forEach(([id, val]) => {
          const item = OPTIONAL_ITEMS.find(o => o.id === id);
          html += this.reviewRow(item?.title || id, typeof val === 'string' ? val : 'âœ“');
        });
        html += '</div>';
      }
    }

    html += '</div>';
    return html;
  }

  reviewRow(label, value) {
    return `<div class="review-row"><span class="rl">${escapeHtml(label)}</span><span class="rv">${escapeHtml(String(value || 'â€”'))}</span></div>`;
  }

  // ===== GENERIC FORM STEP =====
  renderFormStep(stepId, module) {
    if (!module) return '<p>Step nÃ£o encontrado.</p>';
    const data = this.getStepData(stepId);

    let html = `<div class="step-header"><h2>${module.title}</h2><p>${module.description || ''}</p></div>`;

    // Dynamic array steps
    if (module.isDynamic && module.arrayField) {
      const items = data[module.arrayField] || [{}];
      html += '<div class="array-section">';
      html += `<div class="array-header"><h4>${module.arrayLabel || 'Item'}s</h4>`;
      html += `<button class="btn-add-item" onclick="wizard.addArrayItem('${stepId}')">+ Adicionar ${module.arrayLabel}</button></div>`;
      items.forEach((item, idx) => {
        html += `<div class="array-item"><div class="array-item-header"><span>${module.arrayLabel} #${idx+1}</span>`;
        if (items.length > (module.arrayMin || 1)) {
          html += `<button class="btn-remove-item" onclick="wizard.removeArrayItem('${stepId}', ${idx})">Remover</button>`;
        }
        html += '</div><div class="form-grid">';
        Object.entries(module.arrayFields).forEach(([key, field]) => {
          html += this.renderFieldInput(`${stepId}_${idx}_${key}`, field, item[key] || '', `data-step="${stepId}" data-idx="${idx}" data-field="${key}"`);
        });
        html += '</div></div>';
      });
      html += '</div>';
      return html;
    }

    // Regular form
    html += '<div class="form-grid">';
    Object.entries(module.fields).forEach(([key, field]) => {
      html += this.renderFieldInput(`${stepId}_${key}`, field, data[key] || '', `data-step="${stepId}" data-field="${key}"`);
    });
    html += '</div>';
    return html;
  }

  addArrayItem(stepId) {
    const module = STEP_MODULES[stepId];
    const data = this.getStepData(stepId);
    if (!data[module.arrayField]) data[module.arrayField] = [{}];
    if (data[module.arrayField].length >= (module.arrayMax || 8)) { alert('MÃ¡ximo atingido.'); return; }
    data[module.arrayField].push({});
    this.setStepData(stepId, data);
    this.render();
  }

  removeArrayItem(stepId, idx) {
    const module = STEP_MODULES[stepId];
    const data = this.getStepData(stepId);
    data[module.arrayField].splice(idx, 1);
    this.setStepData(stepId, data);
    this.render();
  }

  // ===== FIELD RENDERER =====
  renderFieldInput(id, field, value, extraAttrs = '') {
    const req = field.required ? '<span class="required">*</span>' : '';
    const tag = field.tag ? `<span class="field-tag">${field.tag}</span>` : '';

    let input = '';
    switch (field.type) {
      case 'select':
        input = `<select class="form-select" id="${id}" ${extraAttrs}>
          <option value="">Selecione...</option>
          ${(field.options || []).map(o => `<option value="${o}" ${o == value ? 'selected' : ''}>${o}</option>`).join('')}
        </select>`;
        break;
      case 'textarea':
        input = `<textarea class="form-textarea" id="${id}" ${extraAttrs} maxlength="${field.maxLength || 1000}">${escapeHtml(value)}</textarea>`;
        break;
      case 'number':
        input = `<input type="number" class="form-input" id="${id}" ${extraAttrs} value="${value}" min="${field.min ?? ''}" max="${field.max ?? ''}" step="${field.step || 1}" />`;
        break;
      case 'creatable':
        input = `<div class="creatable-container">
          <input type="text" class="creatable-input" id="${id}" ${extraAttrs} value="${escapeHtml(value)}" autocomplete="off" onfocus="showCreatableDropdown('${id}')" />
          <div class="creatable-dropdown" id="${id}_dropdown">
            ${(field.options || []).map(o => `<div class="creatable-option" onclick="selectCreatableOption('${id}', '${escapeHtml(o)}')">${escapeHtml(o)}</div>`).join('')}
          </div>
        </div>`;
        break;
      default: // text
        input = `<input type="text" class="form-input" id="${id}" ${extraAttrs} value="${escapeHtml(value)}" />`;
    }

    return `<div class="form-group">
      <label>${field.label} ${req} ${tag}</label>
      ${input}
      ${field.hint ? `<span class="field-hint">${field.hint}</span>` : ''}
    </div>`;
  }

  // ===== POST-RENDER BINDINGS =====
  bindCurrentStep() {
    const stepId = this.currentStepId;
    const module = STEP_MODULES[stepId];
    if (!module) return;

    // Populate estado dropdown for new client form
    if (stepId === 'cliente') {
      const estadoSelect = document.getElementById('nc_estado');
      if (estadoSelect && ibgeEstados.length > 0) {
        estadoSelect.innerHTML = '<option value="">Selecione</option>' + ibgeEstados.map(e => `<option value="${e.sigla}">${e.sigla}</option>`).join('');
      }
    }

    // Bind change events for form fields
    if (module.fields && !module.isDynamic) {
      Object.keys(module.fields).forEach(key => {
        const el = document.getElementById(`${stepId}_${key}`);
        if (el) {
          el.addEventListener('change', () => {
            const data = this.getStepData(stepId);
            data[key] = el.value;
            this.setStepData(stepId, data);

            // Re-render dimensions if they changed
            if (stepId === 'dimensoes_visual' && ['comprimento_ext','largura_ext','altura_ext','espessura_painel'].includes(key)) {
              this.render();
            }
          });
          // Also on input for live updates
          if (el.type === 'number' || el.type === 'text') {
            el.addEventListener('input', () => {
              const data = this.getStepData(stepId);
              data[key] = el.value;
              this.setStepData(stepId, data);
            });
          }
        }
      });
    }

    // Bind dynamic array fields
    if (module.isDynamic && module.arrayField) {
      const data = this.getStepData(stepId);
      const items = data[module.arrayField] || [{}];
      items.forEach((item, idx) => {
        Object.keys(module.arrayFields).forEach(key => {
          const el = document.getElementById(`${stepId}_${idx}_${key}`);
          if (el) {
            const handler = () => {
              const d = this.getStepData(stepId);
              if (!d[module.arrayField]) d[module.arrayField] = [{}];
              if (!d[module.arrayField][idx]) d[module.arrayField][idx] = {};
              d[module.arrayField][idx][key] = el.value;
              this.setStepData(stepId, d);
            };
            el.addEventListener('change', handler);
            el.addEventListener('input', handler);
          }
        });
      });
    }
  }

  // ===== SUBMIT =====
  async submit() {
    const { valid, errors } = this.validateCurrentStep();
    if (!valid) {
      alert('Corrija os erros antes de enviar:\n\nâ€¢ ' + errors.join('\nâ€¢ '));
      return;
    }

    if (!confirm('Deseja enviar este orÃ§amento? Verifique se todos os dados estÃ£o corretos.')) return;

    const payload = {
      ...this.formData,
      _metadata: {
        product_type: this.selectedProduct,
        client_id: this.selectedClient?.id,
        submitted_at: new Date().toISOString(),
        session_id: currentSessionId,
        user_id: currentUser?.id,
        version: 'v2',
      },
    };

    try {
      const res = await fetch(WIZARD_SUBMIT_URL, {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', ...getAuthHeaders() },
        body: JSON.stringify({
          sessionId: currentSessionId,
          userId: currentUser?.id,
          formData: payload,
          clientId: this.selectedClient?.id,
        }),
      });

      if (!res.ok) throw new Error(`HTTP ${res.status}`);
      const result = await res.json().catch(() => ({}));

      addChatMessage(`âœ… **OrÃ§amento enviado com sucesso!**\n\nProtocolo: ${result.protocol || 'Gerando...'}\nCliente: ${this.selectedClient?.razao_social || 'â€”'}\nProduto: ${PRODUCT_TYPES[this.selectedProduct]?.name || 'â€”'}`, 'system');

      // Clear form
      this.clearStorage();
    } catch (err) {
      alert('Erro ao enviar: ' + err.message);
      addChatMessage(`âŒ Falha ao enviar orÃ§amento: ${err.message}`, 'system');
    }
  }
}

// GLOBAL HELPERS
// ============================================
function escapeHtml(text) {
  if (!text) return '';
  return String(text).replace(/&/g,'&').replace(/</g,'<').replace(/>/g,'>').replace(/"/g,'"');
}

function showCreatableDropdown(id) {
  const dropdown = document.getElementById(id + '_dropdown');
  if (dropdown) {
    dropdown.classList.add('open');
    // Close when clicking outside
    setTimeout(() => {
      document.addEventListener('click', function handler(e) {
        if (!dropdown.contains(e.target) && e.target.id !== id) {
          dropdown.classList.remove('open');
          document.removeEventListener('click', handler);
        }
      });
    }, 10);
  }
}

function selectCreatableOption(id, value) {
  const input = document.getElementById(id);
  if (input) {
    input.value = value;
    input.dispatchEvent(new Event('change', { bubbles: true }));
  }
  const dropdown = document.getElementById(id + '_dropdown');
  if (dropdown) dropdown.classList.remove('open');
}

  const div = document.createElement('div');
  div.className = `chat-msg ${type}`;
  div.innerHTML = `<div class="msg-content">${typeof marked !== 'undefined' ? marked.parse(content) : content}</div>`;
  messagesEl.appendChild(div);

}

  addChatMessage(message, 'user');

  try {
    const res = await fetch(AGENT_URL, {
      method: 'POST',
      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', ...getAuthHeaders() },

        wizardContext: wizard.formData,
      }),

    const data = await res.json().catch(() => ({}));
    const reply = data.output || data.response || data.message || 'Sem resposta.';

  } catch (err) {

  }
}

// ============================================
// AUTH
// ============================================
function getAuthHeaders() {
  const headers = {};
  try {
    const raw = authStorage.getItem(AUTH_STORAGE_KEY);
    if (raw) {
      const parsed = JSON.parse(raw);
      const token = parsed?.access_token || parsed?.session?.access_token;
      if (token) headers['Authorization'] = `Bearer ${token}`;
    }
  } catch {}
  if (currentUser?.id) headers['x-user-id'] = currentUser.id;
  return headers;
}

function generateSessionId() {
  return `session-${Date.now()}-${Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 9)}`;
}

async function checkAuth() {
  try {
    const { data: { session } } = await sbClient.auth.getSession();
    if (session && session.user) {
      const meta = session.user.user_metadata || {};
      if (meta.company_name && meta.company_name !== COMPANY_NAME) {
        await sbClient.auth.signOut();
        showLogin();
        return;
      }
      currentUser = session.user;
      hideLogin();
      startApp();
    } else {
      showLogin();
    }
  } catch { showLogin(); }
}

sbClient.auth.onAuthStateChange((event, session) => {
  if (event === 'SIGNED_IN' && session?.user) {
    const meta = session.user.user_metadata || {};
    if (meta.company_name && meta.company_name !== COMPANY_NAME) { sbClient.auth.signOut(); return; }
    currentUser = session.user;
    hideLogin();
    startApp();
  } else if (event === 'SIGNED_OUT') {
    currentUser = null;
    showLogin();
  }
});

function showLogin() { document.getElementById('loginOverlay').style.display = 'flex'; document.getElementById('appContainer').style.display = 'none'; }
function hideLogin() { document.getElementById('loginOverlay').style.display = 'none'; document.getElementById('appContainer').style.display = 'flex'; }
function getUserRole() { return currentUser?.user_metadata?.role || 'usuario'; }
function isAdmin() { return getUserRole() === 'admin'; }

document.getElementById('loginForm').addEventListener('submit', async (e) => {
  e.preventDefault();
  const email = document.getElementById('usernameInput').value.trim();
  const pass = document.getElementById('passwordInput').value;
  const errorEl = document.getElementById('loginError');
  const btn = e.target.querySelector('button[type="submit"]');
  btn.disabled = true; btn.textContent = 'Entrando...'; errorEl.style.display = 'none';
  try {
    const { data, error } = await sbClient.auth.signInWithPassword({ email, password: pass });
    if (error) { errorEl.textContent = error.message === 'Invalid login credentials' ? 'E-mail ou senha invÃ¡lidos' : error.message; errorEl.style.display = 'block'; }
    else if (data.user) {
      const meta = data.user.user_metadata || {};
      if (meta.company_name && meta.company_name !== COMPANY_NAME) { await sbClient.auth.signOut(); errorEl.textContent = 'UsuÃ¡rio nÃ£o pertence a esta empresa.'; errorEl.style.display = 'block'; }
    }
  } catch { errorEl.textContent = 'Erro de conexÃ£o.'; errorEl.style.display = 'block'; }
  finally { btn.disabled = false; btn.textContent = 'Entrar'; }
});

document.getElementById('chatSendBtn').addEventListener('click', () => {
  const input = document.getElementById('chatInput');
  sendChatMessage(input.value); input.value = '';
});
document.getElementById('chatInput').addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
  if (e.key === 'Enter' && !e.shiftKey) { e.preventDefault(); document.getElementById('chatSendBtn').click(); }
});

// Init
initTheme();
if (typeof lucide !== 'undefined') lucide.createIcons();
marked.setOptions({ breaks: true, gfm: true });
checkAuth();
    </script>
  </body>
</html>
